mapper.select: SELECT * FROM institution WHERE system_id = #{systemId} AND org_id = #{orgId}
SELECT * FROM institution WHERE system_id = #{systemId} AND group_name = #{groupName}
SELECT DISTINCT group_name FROM institution WHERE system_id = #{systemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO institution (system_id, org_name, org_id, group_name, leader_name, leader_emp_no) VALUES (#{systemId}, #{orgName}, #{orgId}, #{groupName}, #{leaderName}, #{leaderEmpNo})

INSERT INTO institution (system_id, org_name, org_id, group_name, leader_name, leader_emp_no) VALUES
(#{item.systemId}, #{item.orgName}, #{item.orgId}, #{item.groupName}, #{item.leaderName}, #{item.leaderEmpNo})
